productDisplayName: Baggit Women Highway Taj Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 19 cm x 10 cmCrafted from genuine leatherette and jute for the trimsA pouch with a metal ring and jute flap, has a concealed magnetic closureA zippered compartment with a zippered separatorA zippered pocket on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
